rationale: The branch campus maintenance tax levies on "all taxable property" without referencing the homestead exemption amount. Increasing the exemption reduces the tax base but requires no amendment to this statute; it operates automatically on the resulting taxable values.
quote: at a rate not to exceed five cents on each $100 valuation of all taxable property in its jurisdiction
_note: No direct statutory conflict. The proposed change would reduce the taxable value base subject to the branch campus maintenance tax, creating a fiscal impact but not requiring amendment to Educ. Code §130.253.
